title: Auto-scrape content sent by Ash — proactive lookup without being asked
what_failed: When Ash sends media or mentions a title (manhwa, webtoon, link, etc.), Pi waits to be asked instead of proactively scraping/checking status online. Should auto-detect intent and fetch relevant info immediately.
suggested_fix: On image/media receive, after vision analysis, auto-trigger web_search or fetch for key titles/URLs detected. Add a proactive scrape step to the media handling pipeline.
